user_prompt: Draft a response to a customer asking why their feature request from 6 months ago is still open.
actual_output:
Priority: MEDIUM
Category: Feature Request - Status Inquiry

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you for reaching out, and I completely understand your frustration. Waiting six months for an update on a feature request is a long time, and I apologize that we haven't provided more clarity on this sooner.

I have looked into the status of your request regarding [Feature Name]. Currently, it remains in our "Under Consideration" queue. While I know this isn't the answer you were hoping for, I want to be transparent about why: our product team prioritizes updates based on a combination of technical feasibility, security requirements, and overall impact across our user base.

Here is what I can do for you today:

1. I have flagged your request with our Product Management team to ensure it is included in the next quarterly review cycle.
2. I have added your account to our "Interested Users" list for this feature, which ensures you will be the first to receive an email notification if we move it into development.

I know this doesn't solve the immediate need, but I want to make sure your voice is heard. Is there a specific workflow you are trying to achieve that we might be able to support with our existing tools in the meantime? I’d be happy to jump on a quick call or exchange some ideas to see if we can find a workaround.

Best,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a support response drafting exercise and provided a high-quality, empathetic draft that followed its internal guidelines.
